videos.title: 🔴 LIVE: Celebrate 250 Years of America! | National Parks USA LIVESTREAM | National Geographic
videos.author: National Geographic
videos.description: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of the United States with a relaxing journey through America’s iconic National Parks. In this National Parks USA Livestream from National Geographic, explore five of America's most unique scenic landscapes and witness the animals that call these protected lands home.
